faqSection.tagline: A GUIDE TO WORDPRESS HOSTING BY WP ENGINE
faqSection.title: An overview and FAQs

content.title: What is website hosting?
content.description: Website hosting or web hosting is a service that enables you to put your content on the internet. It provides space on a server that stores your website's files and makes them available online.

highlightBox.text: Servers are the structures powering the world wide web-made up of both hardware and software. Their job is to process online user requests and deliver content via browsers.

additionalInfo: Through a series of web protocols, servers can access a website by following a web address that's typed into your browser. The type of server and optimization tools you choose will significantly affect your site's performance.

Servers require lots of resources, maintenance, and management, so web hosting is provided by private companies. These are typically referred to as 'web hosts' or 'hosting providers'. Each web host will usually offer multiple hosting plans that vary based on server configurations and added features.

faqs.question: What are the main types of web hosting?
Can a website run without hosting?
Does a domain come with hosting?
Can I host my own WordPress site?
